GHOSTWRITR Read the manuscript as one book, then refine it chapter by chapter with the editor agent. Book: Fiction Smoke Editing: READY_FOR_REVIEW Book Setup Story Setup Story Core World & Cast Plot Blueprint Scene Plan Draft Editing STAGE WORKSPACE Editing This is the full-manuscript review space for the fiction workflow. Once the committed draft exists, the editor can read the novel in its entirety and then refine it chapter by chapter. Reassemble Manuscript Expand Draft Toward Target Commit Editing Stage Open Publish Export Manuscript ▼ Manuscript Readiness The editor stage should only start after the draft exists as a complete book. READINESS SCORE 82/100 RECOMMENDATION blocked EVALUATED 5/8/2026, 12:47:53 PM NEXT MOVE Run another draft-length pass before treating Editing as final. Recovery Path If the manuscript is blocked because core chapters are still too short, run Expand Draft Toward Target. It will deepen the most under-target chapters, then refresh the manuscript assembly and publish package automatically. Editorial Engine Generate structured assessments, create revision candidates, then apply the accepted revision back into the manuscript assembly.
